introSection: Spellbreaker was a steel suspended single rail twin kiddie roller coaster previously located at Legoland California in Carlsbad, California, USA.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Dark purple track and dark red supports.

fullText:
Spellbreaker was a steel suspended single rail twin kiddie roller coaster previously located at Legoland California in Carlsbad, California, USA.



Dark purple track and dark red supports.
